visualGoal: Make a first-time buyer choose the SOFTWARE (and the Windows-PC-vs-iPad fork) before they fall in love with a launch monitor. This is a low-product-density software explainer: the persuasion carries on the compatibility table, the decision fork, and Codex-built comparison infographics, NOT on product cards. Real launch-monitor photos appear only as compatibility anchors (software-flexible vs GSPro-on-ramp vs E6-lifetime-bundle). Do NOT pad with irrelevant hardware to hit an image count.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic home golf simulator bay at dusk, a large impact screen showing a photoreal sunlit fairway, a laptop and a tablet side by side on a small table in front of the mat to visually pose the 'Windows PC vs iPad' choice, an open flat surface beside the tee left clear for a real launch-monitor product overlay, curator Nina Brooks studying the two screens, no fake UI text, no fake brand logos, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake software logos, fake on-screen UI, invented course names, warped hardware, unreadable tiny text, procedural gradient art

infographicPrompts.title: Which software works with which launch monitor (2026)
content: Columns: GSPro | E6 Connect | TGC 2019 | FSX Play | Awesome Golf
Rows: Platform (Win PC / iPad / Mac) | Annual cost | Course library | LM compatibility | Watch-out
GSPro: Win gaming PC, ~$250/yr, 1,100+ community, broad LM (some need own sub)
E6 Connect: Win+iPad, ~$300-600/yr, ~90-100 courses, Uneekor/FlightScope/Garmin/Full Swing/SkyTrak+
TGC 2019: Win only, paid (check current), 100,000+ user courses, FlightScope/Uneekor/ProTee/SkyTrak, Foresight NOT listed
FSX Play: Win only, free-for-life on GC3 / ~$499 Gold on GC3S+Launch Pro, 25+270, Foresight family only
Awesome Golf: Win/Mac/iOS/Android, ~$160/yr or ~$350 once, ~10 courses, FlightScope/Garmin/Rapsodo/Bushnell/Foresight/Square
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center comparison grid, golf greens-and-gold palette, large readable headers, checkmark/X compatibility cells, 'check current' badge on TGC 2019 newer-monitor cells

infographicPrompts.title: Pick your golf simulator software in 4 questions
content: Q1 Windows gaming PC or iPad/Mac? -> iPad/Mac limits you to E6 Connect or Awesome Golf
Q2 Realism vs course count vs fun? -> GSPro (realism) / TGC 2019 (100k courses) / Awesome Golf (fun)
Q3 Already own Foresight or Bushnell? -> FSX Play (mind GC3 vs GC3S fee)
Q4 What's the true annual cost? -> base sub + any monitor-specific membership (Rapsodo Premium / Uneekor Pro / Bushnell Gold)
End node: buy the launch monitor the chosen software supports
infographicPrompts.style: Numbered branching flowchart, IgnitionSim dark bay background, golf accent colors, large nodes, no product photos required

infographicPrompts.title: 3-year software cost, stacked
content: GSPro ~$750 (3yr) + Windows PC $1,000-1,500 + possible monitor sub
E6 Connect ~$900-1,800 (Basic->Expanded), iPad path avoids PC
FSX Play $0 on GC3 / ~$1,500 (3yr) Gold on GC3S/Launch Pro
infographicPrompts.style: Horizontal stacked-bar cost chart, golf palette, clear one-time vs recurring segmentation, annotation callouts

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult golf-gear curator Nina Brooks in a tidy home simulator bay, standing between a mounted impact screen and a small table holding a laptop and an iPad, one hand gesturing at the tablet, calm expert energy, practical not fantasy, product-overlay space to one side, 4:5 portrait.
